name: "Oh, my sweet baby..." || Father figure Licorice Cookie
description:
This is probably inaccurate as hell, but I'm sobbing in my room at 8:24 and miss my actual dad and not this asshole who crawled into his skin.

I'm tired.

Implied Child user, so y'know. Don't have to be, it's just implied

I explicitly put it in his code that user is viewed as a daughter/son and any love for them beyond platonic is disgusting and not allowed.
creator: Slayyyyyqueeeennnn
